name: wayd
description: The coffee break for programmers using AI coding agents. A meme-y social feed built on top of GitHub Issues, post vibes, scroll a random feed, react with emojis, reply via comments. All from within Claude Code, Cursor, Copilot CLI, and other agent-skill-compatible tools.

skills.name: wayd
skills.description: WAYD, What Are You Doing? A coffee-break social feed for programmers.

system.name: gh
system.description: GitHub CLI: used as the transparent backend. Must be installed and authenticated (run `gh auth login`).

system.name: python3
system.description: Python 3.8+, used for the helper scripts that orchestrate gh calls.

python_packages.name: PyYAML
python_packages.reason: Used to parse wayd/config.yml. Most systems have it; otherwise: `pip install pyyaml`.
